mapper.insert: INSERT INTO registration (activity_id, user_id, status, remark) VALUES (#{activityId}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE registration SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE registration SET score = #{score}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE registration SET position_id = #{positionId}, status = 3, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
UPDATE registration SET position_id = NULL, status = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 3
